name: Cherry Tree Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the shortening and brown sugar together until creamy.
2. Blend in the egg and vanilla extract.
3. Sift together the flour, baking soda, and salt; add to the creamed mixture alternately with milk.
4. Stir in the oats. Chill the dough for several hours.
5. Roll out the dough on a lightly floured board or canvas to 1/8-inch thickness.
6. Cut out "tree-tops" using a floured 3-1/2-inch round cutter.
7. Cut out "tree trunks" about 1 inch tall with a sharp knife.
8. Place the circles on a greased cookie sheet, attaching the tree trunks.
9. Press cinnamon candies into the tree tops and sprinkle with green colored sugar.
10. Sprinkle chocolate shot over the tree trunks.
11. Bake in a preheated moderate oven (350°F) for 8 to 10 minutes.
NOTE: Cookies can be cut using a tree-shaped cutter if desired. Decorate as described above.
